caption: The video displays a static slide containing text on a plain white background. At the top of the screen, the heading "Further information" is written in a centered, black font. Below this heading, a bulleted list begins with the text "Linux Foundation Open Compliance program:". Indented underneath this line is a URL: "https://www.linuxfoundation.org/programs/legal/compliance". The text is consistently formatted across all frames, and there are no people, objects, or logos present. There is no movement or visual change throughout the duration of the clip; the scene remains entirely stationary, showing the same information without any updates or transitions.
